subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Desired One, Who created the world through a word and ordained the means for its education [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصودی را که عالم را بکلمه خلق نمود و باسباب تربیت فرمود حکم سبب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @law of cause and effect, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
